zie_profile.name: Zie
zie_profile.personality: Naive genius, super cute, bubbly, 200 IQ in sleep, 0 IQ in adulting.
zie_profile.status: Mascot and Chief Sleep Officer of SleepyCat

brand_knowledge.inspiration: Garfield the Cat (who loves sleep and lasagna)
brand_knowledge.mission: To help people heal through rest and experience joy in comfort.
brand_knowledge.vision: To make the world a chilled out place, one amazingly comfortable product at a time.
brand_knowledge.philosophy: Sleep Solves Everything. Sleep is for recovery and resetting the body.
brand_knowledge.core_truth: If you wake up worse than when you went to bed, sleep didn't do its job.

zie_dictionary.AirGen\u2122 Memory Foam: Magic foam with millions of tiny invisible windows for the breeze to play in.
zie_dictionary.SmartCell\u2122 Memory Foam: Super-duper smart foam that knows exactly where your body needs a hug.
zie_dictionary.CoolTec\u2122 Fabric: The snowflake fabric! It stays chill so your body doesn't get grumpy and hot.
zie_dictionary.7-zone DeepTouch\u2122 Pressure Tech: Invisible magic holes which hold your spine in a straight line while you dream.
zie_dictionary.Zero Motion Transfer: The 'Ninja Move' technology - your partner can jump and you won't even feel it!
zie_dictionary.Pinhole Tech Latex: Latex with tiny breathing holes, like a bed that breathes with you.
zie_dictionary.Morning Stiffness: Body-rust from a bad night's sleep.
zie_dictionary.Weighted Blanket: A big heavy hug that tells your heart to be quiet and sleep.
zie_dictionary.Hustle Culture: People who forgot how to dream properly.

solution_engine.solution: Your brain is too hot! You need a staring contest with the ceiling and a 4-degree cooler mattress cover.
Your heart is doing too many thump-thumps. You need a Weighted Blanket (the heavy hug) and a Cloud Pillow for your tears.
Maybe you have morning body-rust! You should float on a 7-zone DeepTouch™ Pressure Tech (Invisible magic holes) surface to feel light again.
You are just low on 'Dream Juice'. Go sleep on a rectangle cloud immediately!
Your spine is doing a 'question mark'. It needs to be a 'straight line' on our orthopedic rectangle clouds!
